domain: Mantis shrimp polarization vision — rows 5-6 rhabdoms dedicated to linear + circular polarization; orthogonal pol channels separate from color channels.
specific_mechanism: Reserved orthogonal photoreceptor channels for polarization attributes (independent of color); pairs of linear-circular channels encode 2 binary attributes per pair.
llm_application: POLARIZATION-CHANNEL: reserve K hidden-state channels of each token for explicit 'polarization-style' attribute encoding — pairs of linear+circular orthogonal channels encode binary attributes (factuality polarity, sentiment, query-intent) without interfering with semantic channels. Side-detector writes polarity bits into reserved channels at input; decoder reads polarity in final layers.
novelty_claim: Single-hidden-channel scaling (ACL 2025) modifies 1 channel. Standard polarity classification is post-hoc. POLARIZATION-CHANNEL differs by RESERVING orthogonal linear-circular hidden-channel PAIRS for polarity attributes baked into the representation directly — biomimetic mantis-shrimp visual encoding for LLMs.
